Name: Main System-on-Chip
Description: High-performance SoC for main operations, AI inference, display, and media processing.

Name: LPDDR5 RAM Module
Description: High-speed LPDDR5 RAM for system memory, connected directly to SoC.

Name: Wi-Fi 6E & Bluetooth 5.3 Module
Description: M.2 E-key module providing high-performance Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax) connectivity.

Name: Sub-GHz Transceiver (433/868/915 MHz)
Description: Transceiver for Sub-1 GHz wireless communication.

Name: Touchscreen Controller IC
Description: Controller for the capacitive touch panel, enabling interactive navigation and text selection.

Name: USB-C Power Delivery Controller
Description: USB-C Power Delivery controller for charging and external power supply.

Name: Power Management IC (PMIC)
Description: Advanced power management IC for efficient charging and discharge of the LiPo battery.

Name: Accelerometer & Gyroscope
Description: 6-axis accelerometer and gyroscope for measuring orientation and angular velocity, crucial for balancing.

Name: Power Button
Description: Tactile button for 'Up' input.

Name: Function Button 1
Description: Tactile button for 'Up' input.

Name: Function Button 2
Description: Tactile button for 'Up' input.

Name: Scroll Wheel Rotary Encoder
Description: Rotary encoder for scroll wheel movement, without detents for smooth scrolling.

Name: Compact Multi-Axis Joystick
Description: Provides flight control input (e.g., thrust vectoring or rotation) for main MCU.

Name: Front Enclosure Housing
Description: Custom 3D-printed front shell, designed to hold the 4K AMOLED display and provide cutouts for user input components.

Name: Rear Enclosure Housing
Description: Custom 3D-printed rear shell, designed to house the main PCB, battery, and provide ventilation/antenna pass-throughs.

Name: Display Bezel
Description: Thin custom 3D-printed bezel to secure and frame the 4K AMOLED display within the front housing.

Name: Main PCB Mount
Description: Custom 3D-printed internal bracket to securely mount the main PCB within the rear enclosure.

Name: Battery Holder
Description: Custom 3D-printed holder to cradle and secure the Li-Po battery inside the enclosure, preventing movement.

Name: Power Button Mount
Description: Small 3D-printed part to hold and align the tactile power button within the enclosure opening.

Name: Function Button 1 Mount
Description: Small 3D-printed part to hold and align the tactile function button 1 within the enclosure opening.

Name: Function Button 2 Mount
Description: Small 3D-printed part to hold and align the tactile function button 2 within the enclosure opening.

Name: Scroll Wheel Mount
Description: Custom 3D-printed bracket to securely mount the scroll wheel encoder to the front housing.

Name: Joystick Mount
Description: Custom 3D-printed support for the compact multi-axis joystick, ensuring precise movement and secure attachment.

Name: M2x6mm Mounting Screws
Description: Small machine screws for securing internal components like PCBs and modules to 3D-printed mounts.

Name: M3x10mm Enclosure Screws
Description: Screws for fastening the front and rear enclosure halves together.

Name: M2 Heat Set Inserts
Description: Brass threaded inserts for creating strong thread points in 3D-printed parts for M2 screws.

Name: M3 Heat Set Inserts
Description: Brass threaded inserts for creating strong thread points in 3D-printed parts for M3 screws.

Name: LPDDR5 RAM Module Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the LPDDR5 RAM Module that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: NVMe Internal Storage 256GB Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the NVMe Internal Storage 256GB that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: Wi-Fi 6E & Bluetooth 5.3 Module Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the Wi-Fi 6E & Bluetooth 5.3 Module that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: NFC Module Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the NFC Module that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: Sub-GHz Transceiver (433/868/915 MHz) Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the Sub-GHz Transceiver (433/868/915 MHz) that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: Multi-Frequency RFID Module Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the Multi-Frequency RFID Module that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: Touchscreen Controller IC Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the Touchscreen Controller IC that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: Accelerometer & Gyroscope Mount
Description: Form-fitting cradle for the Accelerometer & Gyroscope that holds the sensing surface in its rated orientation. Snap-fit retention so it can be removed for calibration without tools.
